designNotes.skillBaseline: Chaos DoT (5s, 0.40 dotDamagePercent), 0.4 SPR cast component, 5s CD, creates Plagued (6s) for Plague of Toads to consume. Transfer-on-kill: swarm jumps to next pack enemy with REMAINING duration (vs Haunt which starts fresh).

buildIdentities.plague_doctor: Pure DoT scaling — locusts spread, transfer, stack ailments. The infinite-swarm playstyle: get one cast going, ride it through entire packs.
buildIdentities.spirit_caller: Locust as a swarm of mini-minions — kills spawn temp insects, locust+minion damage cross-buffs. Pack hunter playstyle.
buildIdentities.voodoo_master: Locust as setup tool for Toads burst + soul_stack feeder when paired with Hex. Spiky single-target burst.

behaviorSlotAudit.plague_doctor: T1a=dotMult flavored, T1b=PROC, T2b=RICH perAilmentStack, T3a=RICH whileDebuffActive, T3b=PROC, T3c=raw chaosPen, T4b=raw DoT support => 4 procs/rich of 7
behaviorSlotAudit.spirit_caller: T1a=raw dual stat, T1b=PROC, T2b=raw duration, T3a=RICH whileMinionsAlive, T3b=PROC, T3c=raw locustSpreadRadius, T4b=raw minion dmg => 3 procs/rich of 7
behaviorSlotAudit.voodoo_master: T1a=raw crit, T1b=PROC, T2b=RICH whileHexed, T3a=raw damagePerSoulStack, T3b=PROC, T3c=raw CDR, T4b=raw heavy support => 3 procs/rich of 7

designNotes.noNewProcEffectsRequired: All procs reuse fields already added in haunt.json design (castSkill, createComboState, summonMinion). conditionParam.targetHasDebuff and minionsAlive also reused.

branches.theme: Locusts never die. Transfer mechanic upgraded — one cast clears the screen.

nodes.name: Swarm Density
nodes.description: +20/40% Locust DoT damage.
engineFields: dotMultiplier (EXISTS) — Locust-flavored 'denser swarm'

nodes.name: Devouring Tide
nodes.description: Locust ticks have 15/30% chance to apply 1 stack of Poisoned (4s).
engineFields: procs[onAilmentTick] (EXISTS); applyDebuff.poisoned (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Multiplicity
nodes.description: On Locust kill, swarm splits and transfers to 2 enemies (instead of 1). The duplicates carry remaining duration.
engineFields: swarmExtraTransferTargets (NEW — numeric; combo.ts CARRIER_DEATH_BEHAVIOR for staff_locust_swarm reads this and selects N+1 transfer targets)

nodes.name: Plague Pulse
nodes.description: +5/10% damage per debuff on the target.
engineFields: conditionalMods.perAilmentStackOnTarget (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Compounding Plague
nodes.description: +15/30% Locust damage on Plagued targets.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileDebuffActive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Locust Crit
nodes.description: Locust critical strikes apply 1/2 stacks of Poisoned (4s).
engineFields: procs[onCrit] (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Chaos Mastery
nodes.description: +10/20% chaos penetration.
engineFields: chaosPenetration (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Plague Carrier
nodes.description: Locust ticks have 5% chance to instantly cast Hex on the target. Internal cooldown 8s.
engineFields: procs[onAilmentTick] (EXISTS); castSkill (NEW — same as Haunt's Pestilence Carrier)

nodes.name: DoT Support
nodes.description: +15/30% damage to DoT-tagged skills.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Eternal Swarm
nodes.description: Locust transfer-on-kill chains infinitely (max 5 hops per cast). +25% Locust damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.swarmInfiniteChain (NEW — combo.ts CARRIER_DEATH_BEHAVIOR for locust tracks hops, allows up to maxHops); dotMultiplier (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Pandemic Pulse
nodes.description: Locust ticks have 8% chance to spread Locust to all pack enemies (mini-pandemic). Cost: Locust CD +1s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.miniPandemicChance (NEW — tick.ts auto-ailment block: per-tick chance roll; if hits, apply Locust DoT to all pack with current snapshot at half duration); cooldownIncrease (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Transfer Boost
nodes.description: Each transfer-on-kill adds +25% damage to the swarm (compounds, resets when the swarm fully dissipates).
engineFields: swarmTransferDamageBonus (NEW — numeric; tracked per active locust DoT instance, increments on each transfer event in combo.ts)

nodes.name: THE PLAGUE LORD
nodes.description: Locust applies to ALL enemies in the pack on initial cast at 60% snapshot each. Cost: −50% transfer-on-kill damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.locustAoeOnCast (NEW — staff.ts postCast for staff_locust_swarm: apply Locust to every pack enemy with snapshot * 0.60); rawBehaviors.locustTransferDamagePenalty (NEW — combo.ts transfer reduces snapshot by % when set)

branches.theme: The swarm is alive — it spawns minions, feeds them, fights with them.

nodes.name: Lockstep Swarm
nodes.description: +10/20% Locust damage AND +10/20% minion damage.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS); minionDamageMult (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Hive Spawn
nodes.description: Locust kills have 25/50% chance to spawn a 3s temporary spirit minion.
engineFields: procs[onKill] (EXISTS); summonMinion (NEW — same as Haunt Spirit's Touch)

nodes.name: Swarm Lord
nodes.description: While 3+ minions are alive, Locust ticks deal +50% damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.swarmLordThreshold (NEW — tick.ts auto-ailment block for staff_locust_swarm: if activeMinions.length >= minMinions, multiply tick damage by 1 + damageBonus/100)

nodes.name: Lingering Swarm
nodes.description: +20/40% Locust DoT duration.
engineFields: ailmentDuration (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Pack Hunter
nodes.description: +10/20% Locust damage while any minion is alive.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileMinionsAlive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Insect Bond
nodes.description: Locust ticks have 5/10% chance to heal you for 3% max HP if any minion is alive.
engineFields: procs[onAilmentTick] (EXISTS); conditionParam.minionsAlive (NEW — checkConditionParam case: ProcContext.activeMinionCount > 0); healPercent (EXISTS via heal proc effect)

nodes.name: Swarm Reach
nodes.description: Initial Locust cast also hits 1/2 adjacent enemies at 50% snapshot.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.locustSpreadRadius (NEW — staff.ts postCast for staff_locust_swarm: apply Locust to N additional pack enemies at snapshot * percent/100)

nodes.name: Minion Carrier
nodes.description: Each minion attack on a Locust-affected target has 25% chance to spread Locust to a random adjacent enemy.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.minionLocustSpreadChance (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: roll chance; if hit AND target has locust DoT, apply Locust to random pack member with current snapshot)

nodes.name: Minion Mastery Support
nodes.description: +15/30% minion damage.
engineFields: minionDamageMult (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Living Hive
nodes.description: Locust ticks heal each living minion for 1% of their max HP. (Sustains the pack.)
engineFields: rawBehaviors.locustHealsMinionsPerTick (NEW — tick.ts auto-ailment block for staff_locust_swarm: heal each minion by m.maxHp * value/100 per tick)

nodes.name: Insect Apocalypse
nodes.description: Locust kills summon a permanent (8s) swarm minion (max 3 alive). Cost: Locust CD +2s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.locustKillSpawnsPermMinion (NEW — tick.ts death loop: if kill source was Locust DoT AND active swarm minions < maxStacks, spawn spirit_temp minion with override duration); cooldownIncrease (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Hive Mother
nodes.description: Your minions deal +30% damage when attacking Locust-affected targets.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.hiveMotherMinionBonus (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: if target has locust DoT, multiply minion damage by 1 + value/100)

nodes.name: THE COLONY
nodes.description: You permanently maintain a swarm of 4 mini-insect minions (auto-revives 5s after death). Cost: −50% Locust DoT damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.permanentColony (NEW — staff.ts tickMaintenance: ensure N spirit_temp minions alive at all times via summonMinions; revive after timer if dead); dotMultiplier (EXISTS)

branches.theme: Locust as the perfect setup for Toads burst. Hex synergy. Soul stack feeder.

nodes.name: Acidic Sting
nodes.description: +10/20% Locust crit chance.
engineFields: incCritChance (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Soul Feast
nodes.description: Locust ticks on Hexed targets have 15/30% chance to generate 1 soul_stack. ICD 1.5s.
engineFields: procs[onAilmentTick] (EXISTS); conditionParam.targetHasDebuff (NEW); createComboState (NEW — same as Haunt Cursed Tick)

nodes.name: Locust Surge
nodes.description: On Locust cast: gain Locust Surge (+30% damage to your next non-Locust cast within 4s, stacks up to 3 from consecutive Locusts).
engineFields: procs[onCast] (EXISTS); BUFF_DEFS.locustSurge (NEW — UI buff entry; consumed by next non-Locust cast)

nodes.name: Hexed Decay
nodes.description: +20/40% Locust damage on Hexed targets.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileDebuffActive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Stack Synergy
nodes.description: +5/10% Locust damage per active soul_stack.
engineFields: damagePerSoulStackActive (EXISTS in ResolvedSkillModifier; verify staff.ts preRoll wires it)

nodes.name: Cursed Tide
nodes.description: Locust crits have 35/70% chance to instantly cast Hex on target. ICD 5s.
engineFields: procs[onCrit] (EXISTS); castSkill (NEW)

nodes.name: Quickdraw
nodes.description: −15/30% Locust cooldown.
engineFields: cooldownReduction (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Toad Resonance
nodes.description: When Plague of Toads consumes Plagued, immediately refresh Locust cooldown.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.toadsConsumePlaguedRefundsLocust (NEW — staff.ts postCast for staff_plague_of_toads, when consuming plagued: set staff_locust_swarm cooldown timer to 0)

nodes.name: Burst Mastery Support
nodes.description: +20/40% damage to Curse-tagged skills.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Locust Burst
nodes.description: Locust deals 100% of its first-second-of-DoT damage instantly on cast (in addition to the DoT). Cost: −50% transfer-on-kill snapshot.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.locustInitialBurstPercent (NEW — staff.ts postCast: emit instant damage event = (snapshot * dotDamagePercent) * percent/100); rawBehaviors.locustTransferDamagePenalty (shared with T7 keystone in Plague branch)

nodes.name: Soul Eater
nodes.description: When a Locust-affected, Hexed enemy dies: generate 2 soul_stacks. Cost: Locust CD +2s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.locustHexedKillSpawnsSoulStacks (NEW — tick.ts death loop: if killed enemy had locust DoT AND hexed debuff, call createComboState('soul_stack', value)); cooldownIncrease (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Final Whisper
nodes.description: Locust ticks deal +100% damage to enemies below 25% HP.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.locustExecuteThreshold (NEW — tick.ts auto-ailment block: if target.hpPct < hpPercent, multiply tick by 1 + damageBonus/100)

nodes.name: THE BLACK PLAGUE
nodes.description: Each Locust tick applies 1 'Plague Mark' (max 10). At 10 marks the target detonates for 10× tick damage as AoE chaos. Cost: −25% Locust DoT damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.plagueMarkBuildup (NEW — track per-target stack counter on Locust DoT; on reaching maxStacks, emit AoE damage event to pack neighbors = tickDamage * detonationMultiplier; clear marks); dotMultiplier (EXISTS)
